title: GMS Week 06 - SEARCH OF LIFE!
summary:
Main
The weekly roller coaster that has become the global marketplace went through its regular gravitational dropthis week, with the U.S. dollar taking the "cement-footed diving approach" in all ship-recycling destinations… except-you guessed it-Turkey! The Baltic Exchange Dry Bulk Index fell 0.7% down to a two-week low, dragged by the Capesize index, which fell a massive 1.1% over the week.
